summary: Pattern-selection methodology for distributed systems \u2014 Saga (choreography vs orchestration), CQRS, Event Sourcing, Outbox, 2PC/Saga/TCC tradeoffs, Circuit Breaker, Bulkhead, Retry-with-jitter, Idempotency, Leader Election, Rate Limiting \u2014 emitting a per-decision ADR that pins the chosen pattern + its rejected alternatives.
